title: Immortal Armor
description: adds a ore that can be crafted into the most op tools in the game
body:
Adds a powerful ore, **Nectrurm**, mineable with a diamond pickaxe, letting you craft tools and armor that grant near-creative mode abilities. Wearing the full Nectrurm armor set enables true invincibility and lets you toggle flight by pressing **J (now it is just automatic like if you were in creative.)** — soar through the world effortlessly while wielding ultra-OP tools and weapons that break blocks instantly and one-shot mobs. This mod is pure overkill for players craving god-tier power in Minecraft.

**V4.0.0** — adds an item duper where you press **G** to open it.

**V7.0.0** — added the ability to create explosions. By default the keybinding is not bound; it is under the **Miscellaneous** section.

Any version with **x.1.x** is a nerfed version.

**V10.x.x** adds QoL improvements such as:

- redesigned GUIs
- an item picker for the most common items
- a separated settings GUI

**V12.x.x+** adds the ability to bind a key to the keybind **"Phase Through Blocks"** in **Misc** to swap between Survival and Spectator.

**V13.x.x+** adds the following features (a lot):

- 2 new dimensions — the **Cave World** (accessible by breaking bedrock in the Overworld, instantly teleporting you) and the **Skyland** (accessible by going to **Y=400**)
- the ability to perform an **Orbital Strike** by going into the Hacks GUI (default **G**) and clicking the button **"Other Actions"**
- the ability to teleport to any location in the same GUI as before
- fixed flying in Spectator so you can scroll to change speed
- fixed flying checks so if you are not wearing the armor set and enter Spectator, you won't fall through the world
- made the ore harder to find; upgrading the mod keeps the ore in existing chunks with the new texture since the ore is now found only in the End and is mineable only with a diamond pickaxe
- replaced tool textures with default Netherite tool textures
- made diamonds super common in the Cave World
